name: Claude Agent Runner
description: Delegate focused coding sub-tasks to a Claude Code sub-process (`claude -p`). One spawned Claude session is mapped to each OpenClaw conversation key and resumed on subsequent delegations.

claudeBin.description: Override path/name of the `claude` CLI. Defaults to `claude` on PATH.

transcriptDir.description: Directory for NDJSON transcripts. Defaults to `${HOME}/.openclaw/logs/claude-agent-runner`.

extraArgs.description: Extra args appended to every `claude -p` invocation (e.g. `--allowedTools`).
